name: mythosforge-lookgate
description: Score an image against a visual-QA rubric and return a structured PASS/FAIL verdict (JSON). The self-verify half of the MythosForge suite. Bring your own Gemini API key (LOOKGATE_API_KEY or GEMINI_API_KEY); default provider is Google Gemini vision, any OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint via --base-url. No wallet, no payment.
invoke: node gate.mjs --image <path|url> [--rubric r.json] [--palette p.json] [--threshold 0..1] [--set] [--model m] [--base-url url] [--auth bearer|x-api-key] [--out f] [--dry-run] [--schema]

env.note: Default provider is Google Gemini vision — set GEMINI_API_KEY (https://aistudio.google.com/apikey). LOOKGATE_API_KEY is accepted as an alias; LOOKGATE_BASE_URL/LOOKGATE_MODEL target any other OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint.

image.note: path or URL to the image to score

rubric.note: optional JSON-array rubric file; defaults to references/lookgate-rubric.md (default-visual-v1)

palette.note: optional theme/palette file (e.g. a brandkit.json) to check in_palette against

threshold.note: optional 0..1; switches from strict-any-fail to score threshold

set.note: distinctness add-on when scoring a set

out.note: optional path to write the verdict JSON

output: Verdict JSON on stdout (see references/lookgate-rubric.md): { verdict, score, criteria[], fails[], suggestion, rubric_id, image }. Errors: { ok:false, error }.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
